questions.question:
A workload resource diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `qos-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `qos-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetDeployment` is `reporting-api`
- `deploymentInventory` is `kubectl get deployment reporting-api -n qos-lab -o wide`
- `requestsCpuCheck` is `kubectl get deployment reporting-api -n qos-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].resources.requests.cpu}'`
- `requestsMemoryCheck` is `kubectl get deployment reporting-api -n qos-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].resources.requests.memory}'`
- `limitsCpuCheck` is `kubectl get deployment reporting-api -n qos-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].resources.limits.cpu}'`
- `limitsMemoryCheck` is `kubectl get deployment reporting-api -n qos-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].resources.limits.memory}'`
- `qosClassCheck` is `kubectl get pods -n qos-lab -l app=reporting-api -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.qosClass}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n qos-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm requests, limits, QoS class, and namespace events before changing the Deployment manifest`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1901/qos-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1901/qos-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `Deployment Inventory`, `Resource Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not restart the Deployment, do not delete pods, and do not patch the live resource requests or limits during this drill.

verification.description: The QoS diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended workload target, exact resource inspection commands, QoS evidence, event check, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact deployment inventory, resource checks, and safe manifest review commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe QoS remediation guidance is removed
